articles.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
articles.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.

articles.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
articles.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

articles.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
articles.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

articles.title: How business operations teams use Codex
articles.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.

articles.title: How sales teams use Codex
articles.summary: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

articles.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
articles.summary: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
